prestazioni: Engine: G4FJ 1.6L Turbocharged Inline-4 (Gamma T-GDi) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings to handle 350+ HP reliably. Stock crank retained with balanced assembly by JE Pistons.

Turbocharger: Garrett GTX3071R Gen II with billet compressor wheel, 0.63 A/R turbine housing, and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate for precise boost control (targeting 24-26 psi on E85). Custom 3.5" turbo-back exhaust by Milltek Sport with 76mm titanium-coated downpipe and resonated center section to reduce drone.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors paired with a Radium Engineering dual-pump surge tank (2x Walbro 450 LPH pumps) and AEM 340lph inline fuel pump. Motec M150 ECU with flex-fuel sensor for E85 blending, controlled via Link G4+ Xtreme standalone management with custom CAN bus integration for Kia OEM dash retention.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Kia Proceed-specific) with carbon fiber front splitter, overfenders (35mm wider front, 40mm wider rear), and ducktail spoiler. Custom 3M Gloss Black wrap with matte gunmetal accents on lower cladding and mirror caps.

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Kia Proceed-specific valving) with 20mm front and 15mm rear lowering, adjustable camber plates, and polyurethane subframe bushings by SuperPro. Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm) and front strut brace by Cusco.

Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 19x9.5 +22 front / 19x10.5 +30 rear (ET22/ET30) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear). Custom center caps with Kia GT Line logo in red enamel, and BBS RS-GT wheel bolts in titanium.
